Engineering Manager

Acme Corp is growing the platform engineering team and is looking for an Engineering Manager.

Responsibilities

Grow and coach a team of backend and infra engineers. Partner with product on roadmap planning.

Requirements

5+ years of experience in software engineering, with 2+ years managing engineers directly.

People also viewed

  • Director of Engineering
  • Staff Engineer
